page.title: Cleft Sentences Basics
page.subtitle_html: Cleft Sentences Basics — B2 cleft sentence patterns for emphasis with it-clefts and what-clefts.
page.subtitle_text: B2 cleft sentence patterns for emphasis with it-clefts and what-clefts.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Cleft Sentences Basics: Cleft Sentences Basics gives compact B2 anchors for emphasizing people, things, reasons, and actions.","rules":[{"label":"It-cleft","text":"Use it is / was + focused part + that / who clause.","example":"It was Anna who solved the problem."},{"label":"What-cleft","text":"Use what + clause + be + focused part.","example":"What I need is more time."},{"label":"Focus","text":"Choose the cleft pattern to highlight new or contrastive information.","example":"It was the timing that surprised us."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
